testcase.classname: Health Check GET /health - should return ok status
testcase.name: Health Check GET /health - should return ok status

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos should return list of todos
testcase.name: GET /api/todos should return list of todos

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos should return 500 on database error
testcase.name: GET /api/todos should return 500 on database error

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos/:id should return a single todo
testcase.name: GET /api/todos/:id should return a single todo

testcase.classname: GET /api/todos/:id should return 404 if todo not found
testcase.name: GET /api/todos/:id should return 404 if todo not found

testcase.classname: POST /api/todos should create a new todo
testcase.name: POST /api/todos should create a new todo

testcase.classname: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is empty string
testcase.name: POST /api/todos should return 400 if title is empty string

testcase.classname: PUT /api/todos/:id should update an existing todo
testcase.name: PUT /api/todos/:id should update an existing todo

testcase.classname: PUT /api/todos/:id should return 404 if todo not found
testcase.name: PUT /api/todos/:id should return 404 if todo not found

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/todos/:id should return 404 if todo not found
testcase.name: DELETE /api/todos/:id should return 404 if todo not found
